ddls:
CREATE TABLE "source_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the source file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the source file (e.g., header, source, object) */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the source file */,
  "object_file_count" INTEGER /* Number of associated object files generated from the source file */,
  "file_size_kb" REAL /* Size of the source file in kilobytes */,
  "total_size_kb" REAL /* Total size of the file including dependencies in kilobytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  "version_control_id" TEXT /* Identifier for version control system */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Developer who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Developer who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_files" (
  "object_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object file */,
  "source_file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source file that generated the object file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the object file (e.g., header, source, object) */,
  "file_size_kb" REAL /* Size of the object file in kilobytes */,
  "size_with_includes_kb" REAL /* Size of the object file when including dependencies in kilobytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  "version_control_id" TEXT /* Identifier for version control system */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Developer who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Developer who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_files_source_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_file_id") REFERENCES source_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "source_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source file that has a dependency */,
  "object_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object file that is dependent on the source file */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of the dependency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dependency belongs to */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Developer who created the dependency */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Developer who last modified the dependency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_dependencies_source_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_file_id") REFERENCES source_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_dependencies_object_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_file_id") REFERENCES object_files ("object_file_id")
)
